MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DAVID HYMES' Motion To Set Aside And Vacating Default is Granted. No opposition filed. Defendant may file the proposed answer to the complaint within 10 days entry of this order.
